message:
feat: add tracing observability tests, target provider debug trace, and CLI log-level validation

Add in-memory LogCollector tracing subscriber layer and pipeline test that
validates structured trace events at correct severity levels (INFO for
conversion start/complete, TRACE for detection, DEBUG for discovery/parse/verify).
Add debug!() trace for target provider detection in pipeline.rs. Add two CLI
E2E tests validating --verbose and --trace flags produce expected log output.
Harden all pipeline_test mutex acquisitions with unwrap_or_else poison recovery.
Apply rustfmt to error_paths_test and malformed_input_test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
